seo.title: About SmartMall
seo.description: SmartMall – A small shop specializing in game accounts and licensed software. Trusted, transparent, fairly priced, and supported with care.

ownerSection.title: Who is behind the shop
paragraphs: I am a self-taught person who enjoys technology. This shop was created as a side income source and to offer game accounts and licensed software at more accessible prices.
Since the shop is still small, I handle almost everything myself. I will provide clear advice, support within my ability, and try to keep each order as smooth as possible.

ctaSection.title: Want to try shopping with us?
ctaSection.description: Message me if you are not sure what to choose. I will try to give quick advice so you can find the right product.

featuresSection.description: Even though the shop is still small, I try to keep the shopping process simple, delivery fast, and support easy to understand so customers can feel more confident.

steps.title: Simple security
steps.description: Every transaction goes through common banks and popular e-wallets.

steps.title: Fast delivery
steps.description: Account and software information is sent as quickly as possible, mostly within the same day.

steps.title: Dedicated support
steps.description: If you have questions, I will reply as soon as possible, usually during business hours.

heroSection.description: SmartMall focuses on a clear shopping experience, fast support, and transparent service. The goal is to help customers choose easily, buy smoothly, and feel more confident while using their products.

items.title: Clear process
items.description: Product information is clearly presented so customers can choose and compare more easily.

items.title: Fast delivery
items.description: After the order is confirmed, the shop tries to send the account or software as soon as possible.

items.title: Support when needed
items.description: If there are any issues during use, the shop still provides support so customers can feel more confident.

items.title: The beginning
items.description: At first, I mainly sold a few game accounts and software products to friends and acquaintances.

items.title: Growth
items.description: Later, I built a dedicated website to sell to new customers. The shop is still small and mostly self-operated.

items.title: Operation optimization
items.description: I started standardizing the sales process, supporting customers faster, and organizing products more clearly.

items.title: Customer expansion
items.description: The customer base gradually expanded, with more new customers coming from the website and natural referrals.

items.title: Product variety
items.description: More product lines were added to match real customer needs and provide more choices.

items.title: Stability and growth
items.description: I continue improving the customer experience and building a stable foundation for more sustainable growth.
